title: polygala raddiana var. raddiana
intro: Polygala raddiana var. raddiana, also known as Five-Leaf Polygala, is a flowering plant species within the Polygalaceae family, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala raddiana var. raddiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tonics, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
